claim: Jimbo-Miwa-Ueno (1981) Part I 'Monodromy preserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients' canonically resolves to DOI 10.1016/0167-2789(81)90013-0; published Physica D 2(2):306-352, April 1981; authors Jimbo+Miwa+Ueno (THREE authors, with Ueno as third author).

Jimbo-Miwa (1981) Part II 'Monodromy preserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients II' canonically resolves to DOI 10.1016/0167-2789(81)90021-X; published Physica D 2(3):407-448, June 1981; authors Jimbo+Miwa.
source: Crossref API; cross-confirmed via cite in JM Part III (10.1016/0167-2789(81)90003-8) bibliography

claim: Jimbo-Miwa (1981) Part III canonically resolves to DOI 10.1016/0167-2789(81)90003-8; published Physica D 4(1):26-46, October 1981; authors Jimbo+Miwa. The Physica D series under this title contains exactly three parts (I, II, III); no Parts IV or V exist (069r1 cite 'papers I-V' is loose).

Conte & Musette (2008) 'The Painlevé Handbook' 1st edition canonically resolves to DOI 10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1; Springer Netherlands, Dordrecht; ISBN 9781402084904 print / 9781402084911 electronic; authors Robert Conte + Micheline Musette. A 2nd edition (2020) exists at DOI 10.1007/978-3-030-53340-3 (Springer International, Cham, Mathematical Physics Studies series); 069r1 '2008' year-stamp uniquely identifies the 1st edition.

Forrester & Witte (2002) 'Application of the tau-function theory of Painlevé equations to random matrices: P_V, P_III, the LUE, JUE, and CUE' canonically resolves to DOI 10.1002/cpa.3021; published Comm. Pure Appl. Math. 55(6):679-727, online 2002-03-27 / print June 2002; arXiv preprint math-ph/0201051 submitted 2002-01-24. The 069r1 'Forrester-Witte 2002' cite resolves uniquely to this paper (flanking candidates math-ph/0103025 [CMP 2001 PIV/PII/GUE], math-ph/0204008 [Nagoya 2004 PVI], math-ph/0304020 [Nonlinearity 2003 discrete Painlevé], 10.1017/s1446181100007896 [ANZIAM 2002 short note] are year- or topic-mismatched).

Accessibility-tier classification: Forrester-Witte 2002 (10.1002/cpa.3021) is Tier 1 (open-access via arXiv:math-ph/0201051, free PDF). Jimbo-Miwa-Ueno 1981 Physica D series (Parts I/II/III at DOIs 10.1016/0167-2789(81)90013-0, .../90021-X, .../90003-8) is Tier 3 (Elsevier paywall, no arXiv preprint as 1981 predates arXiv; Project Euclid hosts only the open-access 1980 Proc. Japan Acad. precursor notes). Conte-Musette 2008 1st ed (10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1) is Tier 3 (Springer paywall; no open-access full-book preprint). Mixed accessibility: 1 Tier 1, 4 Tier 3.

Verdict ladder selection: V2 ALL_3_RESOLVED_MIXED_ACCESSIBILITY. All three 069r1-cited references resolve to canonical DOIs (Jimbo-Miwa Physica D Parts I-III + Conte-Musette 2008 1st ed + Forrester-Witte 2002 CPA). One is Tier 1 OPEN (FW 2002 via arXiv), four are Tier 3 paywalled (JM I/II/III + CM 2008). No halt conditions triggered (H_ENV1-5 all NOT triggered). Recommended Path γ for synth at LANE-1: use FW 2002 arXiv preprint + already-acquired Okamoto 1987 Funkcial. Ekvac. 30:305 to attempt P_III chart-map closure; fall back to Path β (add JM Part II ILL acquisition) if γ insufficient.
